Our Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. Dr. İrfan Gündüz Received an Award on Behalf of the DEIK Education Economy Business Council

16.01.2023

The Foreign Economic Relations Board (DEIK) Commercial Diplomacy Award Ceremony brought together the trade diplomacy artists of the Turkish business world.

The 4th DEIK Commercial Diplomacy Award Ceremony, which was held on Saturday, January 14 2023 after the DEIK Business Councils Ordinary Financial General Assembly for 2022. 12 DEIK Business Councils were awarded with outstanding performance in 6 categories with their commercial diplomacy activities in 2022.

At the award ceremony, the Chairman of the Board of Trustees of our University and also the Chairman of the DEİK Education Economy Business Council, Prof. Dr. İrfan Gündüz, received the award on behalf of the council, under the Networking Category/B-C group countries which was handed by the Minister of Commerce Dr. Mehmet Muş and DEIK President Nail Olpak.
